items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aims to validate the scenario of 'Individual cancellation within group', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is handled within the system. While there are successful prior steps related to bookings, none specifically address the cancellation process or its outcomes, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result of the exploratory step.
